label: Season 0.x - Uncapped Calibration XP
notes: May 29 is treated as a warm-up calibration day, not a completed daily season.
Season 0.1 starts fresh at the May 30, 2026 6am local window.
After that, each daily 6am window advances Season 0.x by one decimal step.
Windows Task Scheduler is the source of truth for daily reset execution; Codex automation may audit and report scheduler state only.
Rollover updates XP display/state only; it does not delete, rewrite, relock, or reclassify achievements, milestones, expedition records, historical ledger records, or archive records.
